markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content feedback, process updates, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GA4 Access Blocked:** A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is blocking GA4 access, which is critical for moving from instinct-based content decisions to data-driven optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [**Content Direction Shift:** Content must become more casual, focus on business impact, and improve readability by breaking up dense paragraphs and varying anchor text.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**New Content Summary Process:** Udemy's manual process of incorporating Google's AI Overviews into summaries will be automated to improve ranking potential.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [**Leadership Pillar Page:** A new draft by a product person is approved for style and tone, but Udemy will handle the final SEO optimization internally.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

## Topics

### GA4 Access & Data Strategy

  - [GA4 access is blocked by a Data Processing Agreement (DPA).](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Impact:** This prevents data-driven optimization, forcing content decisions to rely on instinct.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [**Status:** GrowthX is assessing technical feasibility; progress is expected.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [GrowthX will hold off on sharing Looker setup notes for one week to see if the DPA resolves.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### Content Feedback & Refinement

  - [**Overall Tone:** Shift from dense to more casual and readable.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Focus:** Emphasize business impact and outcomes, especially in conclusions.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Readability:** Break up long sentences and dense paragraphs for better flow.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [**Repetition:** Ensure each article has a unique intent and avoids content overlap.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:** Vary anchor text (e.g., not just "change management") to improve SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**External Linking:** Include relevant external links in all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Process & Workflow Updates

  - [**Content OS Clarity:** GrowthX will implement a new system to track the status of \~15 articles in review, replacing long Slack updates.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [**Leadership Pillar Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [A new draft ("Heather's version") is approved for style and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The author is a strong writer but not an SEO expert.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Udemy will handle the final SEO optimization internally.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [GrowthX will inform Simran to pause work on this page.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**Secondary Keywords:**](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [**Current Process:** Used for research and outline generation, not explicit section titles.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [**Decision:** Continue the current process to avoid an overly "SEO-heavy" feel.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Future Initiatives

  - [**Automated Content Summaries:**](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Udemy's Manual Process:** Create a 50-word summary using ChatGPT, incorporating bolded text from Google's AI Overviews (AIOs) to improve ranking potential.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**GrowthX Action:** Investigate automating this process. If full automation is not feasible, GrowthX will manually add the AIO text as an input to its pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Blog V2 & On-Page Elements:**](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [**Udemy Plan:** After homepage additions (resource/case study tiles), the team will add in-article elements like related blog cards.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [**GrowthX Action:** Will incorporate any required HTML/tags into its pipeline once V2 launches.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [**GrowthX LLM Tracking Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [GrowthX is building an internal LLM tracking tool (similar to Scrunch/Profound).](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
      - [**Key Feature:** Analyzes prompts from established industry leaders, providing deeper insights into citations and authority than tools requiring user-defined prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [Share Looker setup notes by EOW; revisit in one week if DPA is unresolved.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [Send notes on the new content OS tracking system by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Inform Simran to pause work on the Leadership Pillar Page.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [Investigate automating the AIO content summary process.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
      - [Ensure all new content batches include varied anchor text and external links.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**Udemy:**](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [Keep GrowthX informed about the Blog V2 launch and any required HTML/tags.](https://fathom.video/share/i-DLnAzKCH5Akv34mCJNs6dcQgK5WFuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
